# Maintained corpus of known irreversible-operation prompts (NFR-005a).
# Every entry MUST be matched by the seed never-auto allowlist patterns;
# a miss fails CI. One prompt per line; lines starting with # are comments.
Do you want to run: git push --force origin main?
Allow the agent to run `git push -f origin feature/x`?
Run git push origin main --force-with-lease?
The agent wants to force-push the rebased branch. Approve?
Allow `git reset --hard HEAD~5` to discard local commits?
Run git clean -fdx to remove untracked files?
Approve deleting the remote branch with git push origin --delete release-1.2?
Allow git branch -D experiment to force delete the local branch?
Rebase feature onto origin/main with git rebase origin/main?
Run git filter-repo to rewrite repository history?
Allow the command: rm -rf ./build && rm -rf /tmp/cache?
The agent wants to run sudo rm /etc/nginx/nginx.conf. Approve?
Approve: shred --remove secrets.txt?
Run mkfs.ext4 /dev/sdb1 to format the volume?
Allow dd if=/dev/zero of=/dev/sda bs=1M?
Should I delete all rows from the staging snapshot directory?
Approve removing the entire uploads directory on the file server?
Run chmod -R 777 /var/www to fix permissions?
Execute DROP TABLE users CASCADE?
Run DROP DATABASE analytics_prod?
Approve: TRUNCATE TABLE sessions?
Execute DELETE FROM orders
Run redis-cli FLUSHALL on the cache cluster?
Deploy the current build to production now?
Approve deploying release 2.4 to the live environment?
Run npm publish to release the package?
Execute cargo publish for the crate?
Upload the wheel with twine upload dist/*?
Run terraform apply on the prod workspace?
Approve terraform destroy for the staging stack?
Run pulumi up against production?
Execute kubectl delete deployment api-server -n prod?
Run kubectl drain node-3 --ignore-daemonsets?
Approve helm uninstall payments from the prod namespace?
Create the GitHub release with gh release create v2.0.0?
Delete the draft release via gh release delete v1.9.9?
Run docker system prune -af to reclaim space?
Execute aws s3 rb s3://customer-exports --force?
Run aws s3 rm s3://backups/2024 --recursive?
Execute gcloud sql instances delete prod-db?
Run az group delete --name production-rg?
Rotate the production API keys now?
Approve revoking the deploy token for CI?
Regenerate the database password and update the secret store?
Delete the service-account credentials file and recreate it?
Run gh auth logout to sign out of GitHub CLI?
Shutdown the build server after the run completes?
Run systemctl stop postgresql on the primary?
Execute killall -9 node to clear stuck processes?
Send the invoice email to all customers in the list?
Merge the pull request into main and delete the branch?
